title: IPv6 forwarding issues
body:
Pasta forwards IPv6 traffic via link-local addresses, which are not routable across namespaces. The `--map-guest-addr` interaction causes destination rewriting to link-local scope.

https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/755#issuecomment-4390420134
https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/755#issuecomment-4390515389
https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/755#issuecomment-4392427315
https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/755#issuecomment-4447539681
https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/755#issuecomment-4465899736

comments.body:
@Honny1 small correction here: the case observed in that bug is *not* caused by `--map-guest-addr`, in fact use of `--map-guest-addr` with a global scope address could fix it.

It's not at all clear to me what pasta can/should do differently here.
